message:
Remove Kafka OAuth refresh diagnostics state plumbing

Drop the callback-level oauth_refresh_diagnostics tracking to reduce the
change surface area while keeping the auth behavior intact.

Behavior preserved:
- AWS IAM OAUTH refresh callback setup
- background-callback primary path
- poll-based warmup/retry fallback for metadata discovery
- explicit callback-servicing and setup diagnostics notes

Removed:
- shared diagnostics state struct
- callback attempt/success/failure counters
- last_result/last_failure state capture and reporting

The fallback retry path now retries once when poll-serviced callbacks are
active, without depending on shared callback counters.
